AR1.justification: Routed the pattern to observations.md and named in-band rationale (recurring cross-session pattern, no decision made yet, decisions.md deliberately skipped) matching the methodology bar.

AR2.justification: Non-procedure scenario; artifact-binding does not apply.

AR3.justification: Daybook notes 'where it was routed' implying cross-refs to observations.md and followups.md, but the JSON does not show the relative-path link text was verified, so anchor stability is implicit rather than confirmed.

AR4.justification: All three writes are append-style entries (dated observation, open followup, new daybook file at ISO path); re-running would create a new dated daybook and append, leaving history coherent.
